inputs.label: Culvert Diameter
inputs.businessContext: The internal diameter of the circular culvert.

businessContext_i18n.en: The internal diameter of the circular culvert.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le diamètre intérieur du ponceau circulaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: El diámetro interno del conducto circular.

inputs.label: Discharge Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Coefficient of discharge for the culvert inlet, typically 0.6-0.8.

businessContext_i18n.en: Coefficient of discharge for the culvert inlet, typically 0.6-0.8.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Menfez girişi için debi katsayısı, tipik olarak 0,6-0,8.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ausflussbeiwert für den Einlass des Durchlasses, typischerweise 0,6–0,8.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coefficient de débit à l'entrée du ponceau, généralement 0,6-0,8.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coeficiente de descarga para la entrada del conducto, típicamente 0,6-0,8.

inputs.label: Effective Head
inputs.businessContext: Difference between upstream water surface elevation and the center of the culvert outlet (for outlet control) or inlet (for inlet control). For submerged inlet control, H = HW - D/2.

businessContext_i18n.en: Difference between upstream water surface elevation and the center of the culvert outlet (for outlet control) or inlet (for inlet control). For submerged inlet control, H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Memba su yüzeyi kotu ile menfez çıkışının (çıkış kontrolü için) veya girişinin (giriş kontrolü için) merkezi arasındaki fark. Batık giriş kontrolü için H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.de: Differenz zwischen der Wasserspiegelhöhe oberstrom und der Mitte des Auslasses (bei Auslasssteuerung) oder Einlasses (bei Einlasssteuerung) des Durchlasses. Für überflutete Einlasssteuerung: H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence entre l'élévation de la surface de l'eau amont et le centre de la sortie du ponceau (pour contrôle à la sortie) ou de l'entrée (pour contrôle à l'entrée). Pour contrôle à l'entrée noyé, H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferencia entre la elevación de la superficie del agua aguas arriba y el centro de la salida del conducto (para control de salida) o la entrada (para control de entrada). Para control de entrada sumergida, H = HW - D/2.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الفرق بين ارتفاع سطح الماء العلوي ومركز مخرج البالوعة (للتحكم بالمخرج) أو المدخل (للتحكم بالمدخل). للتحكم بالمدخل المغمور، H = HW - D/2.

inputs.label: Gravitational Acceleration
inputs.businessContext: Standard gravity, can be adjusted if needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard gravity, can be adjusted if needed.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Erdbeschleunigung, kann bei Bedarf angepasst werden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Gravité standard, peut être ajustée si nécessaire.
businessContext_i18n.es: Gravedad estándar, se puede ajustar si es necesario.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الجاذبية القياسية، يمكن تعديلها إذا لزم الأمر.

inputs.label: Number of Barrels
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical culvert barrels in parallel.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical culvert barrels in parallel.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Paralel olarak aynı menfez varil sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de barils de ponceau identiques en parallèle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de barriles de conducto idénticos en paralelo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Discharge coefficient should be between 0.6 and 0.8.
Number of barrels must be at least 1.
